About the Game

Survive the Night

Try to Survive is a fast-paced 2D horde survival game set in a medieval fantasy world. Stand your ground as waves of enemies close in — fight, upgrade, and outlast them all. Built entirely by one developer with passion for pixel art and game design.

⚔️

Endless Waves

Each wave is bigger and more brutal than the last. Test your skills across escalating enemy hordes that never stop coming.

⬆️

Upgrades & Abilities

Unlock and level up powerful abilities between waves. Choose your playstyle and build a setup that can carry you to the end.

🎨

Unlockable Looks

Earn new colors and visual styles as you play. Show off your progress with unique character appearances.

🏰

Pixel Art World

Hand-crafted in the Tiny Swords style by Pixel Frog. A beautiful medieval world that pulls you right in.

Gameplay

Step Into the World

Explore · Fight · Survive

The Developer

Yluos Games

Solo indie self-taught developer. Try to Survive is a first release — built from scratch in Unity with custom code, design, art integration and audio. Always learning, always building.
